plugins.name: lens
plugins.description: A web dashboard to scan, browse, and edit all Claude Code configuration surfaces across all scope levels

plugins.name: local-code-review
plugins.description: Local Code Review — GitHub-style threaded code review. Claude can read review sessions, reply to threads, apply fixes, and resolve open questions.

plugins.name: hooksmith
plugins.description: Declarative YAML hook rules compiled to native Claude Code hooks. Supports regex, script, and prompt mechanisms with build-time validation.
